positive: A symmetrical and intricate mystical forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and stylized celestial elements merging into the landscape. The main subject is a central, stylized grouping of ancient trees forming a mandala pattern, framed by cosmic nebulas and gentle, abstract flowing river lines. Use a highly contrasted silhouette style with deep indigo, vibrant emerald, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be perfect for apparel print, utilizing clean linework, sharp contrast, and a balanced, repeating decorative feel. Trending on Art Nouveau and mystical folk illustration aesthetics. Flat, vector-like quality with maximalist detail, concept art, 8k resolution, high contrast illustration.
